author: RamSet
releaseNotes: v1.3.3 - Fixes the driver namespace to match the manifest (was 'Mezel') so Package Manager matching/updates work, and uses the hub timezone for timestamps instead of a hardcoded zone. Includes capability integration, timestamp parsing, and core/optional attributes.

drivers.name: Acuparse Weather Station
drivers.description: Weather driver for polling Acuparse JSON data with capability integration and selectable extra fields.
